metadata.purpose: Two different models on the same provider + harness: capability profile and ranking.
metadata.hold-fixed: provider + invocationPath + posture identical; only `model` varies.
metadata.note: Whole suite runs (taskIds omitted). The interesting output is the per-language and per-category sub-score PROFILE, not the single composite: one model may lead on Python and trail on TypeScript. Report the profile, not just the winner.
metadata.replace-before-running: Set `provider`/`model` to real ids registered in your Poetic install.
